arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres sends Mikel Arteta fresh Arsenal transfer message at perfect time
arts.sum: Arsenal transfer target Viktor Gyokeres has proven his worth yet again by scoring another three goals in his latest Sporting CP performance. Although the striker himself has previously thrown cold water on any January transfer taking place, anticipation still continues to build for the summer 2025 window.

arts.ttl: Arsenal drop triple team news hint for Brighton clash as Jurrien Timber replacement 'revealed'
arts.sum: The latter made it on to the pitch and Arteta has since revealed that Havertz is fit to feature, but Jurrien Timber is unavailable due to suspension after picking up a fifth yellow card in the final top-flight game before the threshold of bookings increases to 10. In the ongoing absence of Ben White and Takehiro Tomiyasu, Timber has been required on a number of occasions with issues for Riccardo Calafiori also seeing Myles Lewis-Skelly feature more frequently for their first-team.

arts.ttl: Man United, Arsenal 'handed fresh blow' in 'pursuit' of Wolves star Matheus Cunha
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers are reportedly looking to sign Matheus Cunha, who continues to be linked with Manchester United and Arsenal, to a new contract.

arts.ttl: Matheus Cunha to Arsenal transfer latest after Mikel Arteta drops January window hint
arts.sum: The Gunners are now able to strengthen their squad via new signings after the transfer window opened on New Year's Day. It remains to be seen if Arsenal will be in the market for new additions over the next few weeks, with rumours already starting to swirl about the business that may be conducted. "I don’t know because the focus is on the players we have," Arteta told reporters on Friday when asked if he expects Arsenal to make any new signings during the transfer window.

arts.ttl: Greg Taylor 'wants' Celtic transfer exit as Kieran Tierney ripple effect sparks link up with World Cup hero
arts.sum: Taylor is out of contract at the end of the season and is a target for Cannavaro's Dinamo Zagreb.

arts.ttl: Sources: What Matheus Cunha is now thinking of doing as Arsenal and Man City make interest known to Wolves
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively confirm what Matheus Cunha is now thinking of doing amid interest from the likes of Arsenal, Manchester City, Manchester United and...

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta confirms huge Arsenal fitness boost ahead of Brighton clash
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta expects Kai Havertz back from his sickness bug in time for Brighton vs Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Brighton vs Arsenal Premier League score predicted as Gabriel Jesus scores again
arts.sum: We predict that Arsenal could set up in a 4-3-3 formation, with their line-up as follows: Raya; Partey, Saliba, Gabriel, Lewis-Skelly; Rice, Odegaard, Havertz; Martinelli, Jesus, Trossard. Arsenal have the chance to close the gap between themselves and Liverpool to three points later today when the Gunners take on Brighton and Hove Albion in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Arsenal predicted XI vs Brighton as Calafiori dropped, Jesus and Havertz start
arts.sum: Kai Havertz decision, Partey role and Ethan Nwaneri dropped - Arsenal predicted XI vs Brighton Arsenal hopes to have shaken off any remaining issues from the illness bug that hit the squad before Brentford, which cost Kai Havertz a place with the team.

arts.ttl: Two sources rubbish claims over Brighton transfer – Not even in contact with Seagulls
arts.sum: It would appear nothing about Valentín Barco is ever simple. After his loan to Sevilla turned into something of a disaster, although he managed to get engaged off the pitch so that’s something, the media closest to the Spanish club have explained Barco has been packing his bags and will return to Brighton.
